title: Calendar component missing last day of multi-day events
symptom: Multi-day events in the calendar component do not display the last day. Users see that events are cut off before the final day.
not_this_if: Events are not marked as 'All Day'
root_cause: The FullCalendar library used by WeWeb requires that all-day events have an exclusive end date. This means that the end date is treated as a cutoff, causing the last day of the event not to be displayed.
fix_steps: Open the event settings in the calendar component
Change the end date to one day after the actual end date
Save the changes and refresh the calendar
agent_instruction: Adjust the end date of all-day events to be one day later than intended.
